summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WhatsApp Business automation SaaS app iteration 2. Backend API structure working but AI integration blocked by budget limit. Frontend authentication flow preventing access to key new features including step 2 phone input testing. Dashboard protection and dark theme working excellently.

critical_bugs.issue: Emergent LLM integration failing due to budget exceeded (Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.001704, Max budget: 0.001)
critical_bugs.impact: AI chat functionality completely broken - returns fallback error messages only
critical_bugs.details: Claude Sonnet 4.5 integration via emergentintegrations library not working

working_endpoints.status: Working correctly, returns 200 with status: ok
Returns 200 but with fallback error messages due to LLM budget issue

critical_bugs.issue: Authentication/signup flow not progressing from step 1 to step 2
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks access to testing step 2 phone number input (primary test requirement)
critical_bugs.details: Auto-login after signup improvement appears to have broken the progression flow

critical_bugs.issue: Signup link not clickable or functional
critical_bugs.details: Cannot toggle between login and signup modes

blocked_features.issue: Cannot access due to step 1 authentication blocking
blocked_features.impact: Cannot test country code dropdown + phone input side by side layout (primary test requirement)

blocked_features.issue: Cannot access dashboard due to authentication failure

blocked_features.issue: Cannot access dashboard to test real-time features
blocked_features.impact: Cannot test conversations and orders real-time updates

working_features.status: Excellent - dark theme, navigation, responsive design all working
Perfect - correctly redirects unauthenticated users to /login
Excellent - no white backgrounds found, consistent styling
Working - Start Free → onboarding, Log in → login page

passed_tests: Backend chat endpoint (/api/chat) returning 200 status with proper error handling
Landing page loads with excellent dark theme styling
Navigation from landing page works correctly (Start Free → onboarding, Log in → login)
Dashboard route protection working perfectly (redirects to /login)
Dark theme consistency maintained across all pages (no white backgrounds)
Onboarding page accessible with 4-step indicators visible
Page routing and URL handling working correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix authentication flow in onboarding step 1 to allow progression to step 2. The auto-login after signup improvement appears to have broken the flow. Also fix Emergent LLM budget issue - the API key has exceeded its budget limit making AI chat completely non-functional. These are blocking issues preventing testing of the primary new features (phone input layout, notification badges, real-time subscriptions).

success_percentage.frontend: 40% (Basic functionality working, authentication blocking key features)
success_percentage.overall: 50% (Core infrastructure working, but key new features not testable due to auth issues)
